title: USB LED Desk Lamp with Nightlight
availability_text: Only 12 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Battery or USB powered (Batteries: 4 x AAA not supplied)
14 bright LEDs behind a plastic diffuser provide even light projection
Flexible rubber gooseneck directs light to exactly where it is needed
Short-press the touch control for 3 levels of brightness
Long-press the touch control for soothing yellow nightlight built into the base
description: Dimmable touch sensor LED lamp with 3 brightness settings. A soothing nightlight built within the base creates extra ambience and a feeling of warmth. The flexible goose-neck stem directs light accurately where required. Powered by either USB or batteries, making it ideal for use at home or on your travels.
